overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountainous landscape. She moves from a campsite through rocky terrain and tall red grass to reach a cliff overlooking a vast valley with ancient ruins visible in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with scattered ruins

agents.ego_description: walking away from a wooden camp structure through rocky snow-covered terrain with scattered dead trees

entered.detail: primitive wooden shelter with cloth coverings near the starting position
tall rusted metal structures perched on the distant ridge line
massive weathered boulder formation covered in patches of snow
leafless bare trees scattered across the snowy hillside

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a wooden camp structure in a snowy mountain environment. She walks forward through rocky terrain with patches of snow and scattered dead trees, moving away from the camp area into more open landscape with ancient metal towers visible on the distant ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow fields transitioning to red grass meadows

events.description: character enters tall red grass area from open snow field

agents.ego_description: moving through open terrain approaching and entering fields of distinctive red vegetation that sway in the wind

entered.detail: dense patches of crimson-colored tall grass swaying in the wind
hazy snow-capped mountains visible through the atmospheric fog

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into wider snow-covered fields with distinctive red vegetation patches. The character approaches and enters the tall red grass, which sways in the wind, while distant mountains become visible through the hazy atmosphere and the camp structures disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside covered in dense red grass leading to cliff edge

events.description: emerges from red grass onto rocky cliff edge revealing expansive valley view

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through dense red grass toward a vantage point overlooking the valley

entered.detail: rocky precipice marking the edge of the high vantage point
sweeping view of the valley floor with scattered ruins and forest below

segments.scene_description: Moving uphill through the dense red grass, the character ascends toward a cliff edge. As she emerges from the vegetation, a vast valley with scattered ruins and distant mountains reveals itself, transitioning from enclosed grass to open panoramic vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain peak overlook with 360-degree valley views

events.description: character stops walking and slowly rotates to survey the panoramic landscape

agents.ego_description: standing on the cliff edge slowly rotating to take in the panoramic views of the valley and surrounding peaks

entered.detail: ruined metal towers and derelict buildings visible in the valley below
tall mountain peaks covered in snow rising in the background

segments.scene_description: At the cliff's edge, the character pauses to observe the expansive vista. The camera pans slowly across the misty valley revealing ancient structures, distant mountains, and snow-covered peaks in a sweeping 360-degree view of the post-apocalyptic landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded snowy campsite that gradually expands into a breathtaking panoramic vista of a post-apocalyptic valley. It begins near a wooden camp structure, moving through rocky terrain and scattered dead trees toward distant metal towers on a ridge. As the landscape opens, the camera follows the character into wide, snow-covered fields where the terrain shifts into swaying patches of tall red vegetation. The scene then ascends through this dense red grass toward a cliff edge, transitioning from the enclosed foliage to a sudden, wide-open expanse. Finally, the camera pauses at the precipice to pan across a misty valley, revealing ancient ruins and snow-capped peaks in a sweeping view of the horizon.
